title: ZXBrick Achievements
description: Unlock achievements by playing ZXBrick, destroying bricks, and reaching new gameplay milestones.
summary: Achievements reward your progress as you master ZXBrick and encourage you to keep improving with every game.

sections.heading: Available Achievements
paragraphs: ZXBrick includes a collection of Game Center achievements that reward regular play and key gameplay milestones.
Whether you're aiming to complete more games or smash thousands of bricks, every achievement provides another goal to work towards.

sections.heading: Keep Challenging Yourself
paragraphs: Choose one achievement to focus on during each play session. Smaller goals make it easier to see your progress while gradually unlocking the full achievement collection.
Achievements work alongside leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins, giving you more reasons to return for another game.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Counts
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements give you extra goals to work towards every time you play ZXBrick.
body: Whether you're chasing your next milestone or aiming to destroy even more bricks, achievements provide an extra layer of progression without changing the fast-paced arcade gameplay.
Combined with leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins, achievements encourage you to keep improving and coming back for one more game.
bullets: Works alongside leaderboards and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Unlock new milestones as you continue playing ZXBrick.
